summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing completed for adoca.net multiservice platform. All core features working perfectly including automatic covers, multiservice support (Photos + Video 360), NET PRICE calculator, and responsive design.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: API endpoint validation issue but functionality works via admin panel
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Admin panel successfully creates live sessions

passed_tests: Gallery displays all 3 events (PAULA, FERNANDA, RESIDEO) with automatic covers
RESIDEO shows both Photos and Video 360 service tags correctly
Automatic covers display with correct colors and emojis (📸/🎥)
Calendar filter functionality working - events filter by selected date
Responsive grid scales correctly from desktop to mobile
Cotizador calculates NET PRICE correctly as configured
Video 360 option adds exactly +$3,000 to quotes as specified
Admin panel loads with all events and creation form
Admin form has Photos and Video 360 checkboxes for multiservice
Admin allows creating events without photos (uses automatic covers)
Admin preferences tab controls NET PRICE display setting
PicParty Live code scanner connects successfully to active sessions
API /api/events returns has_photos and has_video360 fields correctly
Backend API validates RESIDEO has both photos:true and video360:true
Quote API correctly implements Video 360 pricing (+$3,000)
